notes: Phase 2 / Tier 15 (Throne of Thunder) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins MoP Classic Frost Death Knight gear guide (anchor phase-3-best-in-slot); dual-wields two Qon's Flaming Scimitar. Tier set: Pauldrons/Breastplate/Gauntlets/Greaves of the All-Consuming Maw. Enchants/gems reused from the mop-p3 (Siege of Orgrimmar) list — same items across MoP raid content.
